case_title: THOMPSON, SANDRA FABBRI vs. DOUGHERTY, EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, SANDRA FABBRI SERVED NOV-16-1995, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGHERTY, EDWARD AMERICAN BUSINESS PRODUCTS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, SANDRA FABBRI AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGHERTY, EDWARD AMERICAN BUSINESS PRODUCTS DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGHERTY, EDWARD AMERICAN BUSINESS PRODUCTS
